summary: Cycle D (4th overnight-triage fire of UTC 2026-05-23, ~57min after cycle C) ran heartbeat-only. Both queues absent on disk for 25th consecutive cycle. regen-all clean: ALL CHECKS PASSED, round-trip 0 failures (22.9s elapsed at 03:04:16Z). Tree at cycle D open had src/pages/settings.js M from session start, RESOLVED by Founder commit 476beed1 (feat(settings): theme preview swatches) between cycle C close and cycle D open. METRIC-INTEGRITY HEADLINE: A12_operational that cycle C declared 'RESOLVED authoritatively, dropped' has REGRESSED back to yellow (100 green -> 75 yellow; 2/10 skip-dirty -> 6/10 skip-dirty). overall_score 89.1 -> 87.8 (-1.3). Cycle D restores A12 to carry-over list with honest correction of cycle C's optimistic resolution claim. Lesson explicitly recorded: rolling-window scores are 'observed-improved' not 'resolved-authoritatively' from a single-cycle data point. C->D window: 7 commits total (5 substantive: 476beed1 settings feat + e68e6ee7/a5f9b2c4 baseline blesses + ffdea23e visual-regression expansion + 850fa6a7 findplayers tier separators; 2 cron post-commit regens). New untracked Founder WIP scripts/visual-audit/_settings.mjs at cycle D open - left alone, not in cycle D commit. Metric-integrity attestation: HONEST - explicit correction made transparent, A12 restoration not silent. 5 carry-over Founder action items at cycle C close + 1 RESTORATION (A12) = 6 carry-over for cycle D close.
founder_action_items: Cron cadence - now 25 consecutive empty-inbox fires (22 of 2026-05-22 + cycles A+B+C+D of 2026-05-23). Suggested remedy unchanged from cycles R->C: add guard at Step 0 of overnight-triage prompt - exit clean if no motion in task-queue/founder/, escalations/inbox/, or bug-reports/inbox/ in last 3h AND regen-all last-pass < 60 min old. Would reduce nightly fires from ~24 to ~6-8 while preserving real heartbeat coverage. **Founder decision required (9th consecutive cycle flagging this).**

A8_performance: dimension score 80 green at cycle D, but underlying Lighthouse 65/100 on 1 page (target 75+) - open .lighthouseci/*.html, fix top failures (carry-over from cycles S+T+U+A+B+C; dimension score rose due to rolling-window mechanics but page-level fix still pending).

main-flows.html user-context capture ~8.04 days stale - run `node scripts/visual-audit/founder-context-capture.mjs` before next ship-close (natural drift, not blocking; same diagnosis as cycles S->C).
quota-status weekly_cap field still null - no % computation possible (preserved Founder-triage item from cycles R->C; sidecar discipline OK per [quota-status-schema] check).

aggregate-fiq-status D40 parity GATE-FAIL - stale-timestamp >24h hard threshold tripped because FIQ has had zero churn across 25 consecutive empty-inbox cycles (~25h+ elapsed). NOT an aggregator bug (status=green declared=26 deployed=26 ran cleanly; idempotent-write correctly skipped unchanged content). Gate firing as designed per scripts/aggregate-self-tests.py:138-141. Remedies all cross Founder-decision boundary: (1) add last_polled_at heartbeat field to decouple poll-staleness from content-staleness, (2) raise 24h threshold to 48-72h, (3) refine D40 parity to distinguish idempotent-skip-grace from aggregator-failed-and-stale, (4) accept the GATE-FAIL as a faithful signal and surface it on dashboard. First flagged 2026-05-23 cycle B post-commit. Will trip on every cycle until FIQ activity resumes or remedy lands.

A12_operational RESTORED to carry-over: dimension 75 yellow (6/10 skip-dirty in rolling window) vs cycle C's 100 green (2/10 skip-dirty). Cycle C declared this 'RESOLVED authoritatively, dropped' - that claim was based on a single-cycle window observation and has been falsified by C->D window data. Honest correction: rolling-window scores require multiple consistent cycles to declare authoritative resolution, not a single observation. Likely C->D regression cause: 4 additional cron post-commit hook runs (Founder ship-sprint cadence) re-tripped skip-dirty faster than watcher cleared. Same remedy as before: check .husky/post-commit doesn't dirty tree mid-run + verify routinePatterns allowlist covers all auto-generated outputs.
metric_integrity_corrections_this_cycle: Cycle C declared A12_operational 'RESOLVED authoritatively' on a single-cycle window observation; cycle D data falsifies that claim. A12 restored to carry-over with explicit reasoning + lesson captured. No silent restoration.
